title: Kenyan Fried Chicken
description: A crispy fried chicken dish inspired by Kenyan flavors. This recipe combines spicy fermented flavors with a crunchy exterior.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the hot sauce and garlic.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour and eggs.
Dip each chicken piece into the flour mixture, then the egg mixture, and finally the flour mixture again.
Fry the chicken pieces in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fried chicken on paper towels.
Serve the fried chicken hot, topped with crispy fried onion rings.
